    B

    buildCartSection() - Method in class POSPanel
    Builds and returns the cart/checkout section of the POS interface.
    buildCheckoutSection() - Method in class POSPanel
    Builds and returns the checkout section of the POS interface.
    buildCustomerSection() - Method in class POSPanel
    Builds and returns the customer information section of the POS interface.

    Builds and returns a grid of drink selection buttons for the POS interface.
    buildDrinkPanel() - Method in class MenuPanel
    Constructs and returns the Drinks tab panel.
    buildFoodPanel() - Method in class MenuPanel
    Constructs and returns the Food tab panel.

    Builds and returns the left panel of the POS interface.
    buildRightPanel() - Method in class POSPanel
    Builds and returns the right panel of the POS interface.
    buildSearchPanel() - Method in class POSPanel
    Builds and returns the search panel for the POS interface.

    dataChanged - Variable in class InventoryPanel
     
    deleteDrink(int) - Method in class MenuPanel
    Prompts the user for confirmation, then deletes the specified drink and all of its associated drink_recipe rows within a single transaction.

    Prompts the user for confirmation, then deletes the specified food item and all of its associated food_recipe rows within a single transaction.

    G

    generateReport() - Method in class SalesReportPanel
    This function generates a sales report.
    generateReport() - Method in class XReportPanel
    Generates the X-Report by querying the database for all sales made during the current shift.
    generateReport() - Method in class ZReportPanel
    Generates a Z-Report and closes all open receipts.
    GetAllTime() - Static method in class TrendsPanel
    This function finds and returns the eailiers purchase date and the latest purchase date.
    getCellEditorValue() - Method in class POSPanel.ButtonEditor
    Returns the value of the cell editor and performs the associated action.
    getConnection() - Method in class MainMenuPanel
    Establish access to the sql database
    getConnection() - Method in class MenuPanel
    Loads database connection credentials from the .env file located in the working directory and opens a JDBC connection, storing it in MenuPanel.conn.
    getConnection() - Static method in class PanelTemplate
     
    getConnection() - Method in class POSPanel
    Establishes a connection to the database using credentials stored in a .env file.
    getConnection() - Static method in class PurchasesPanel
    Reads database credentials from the .env file in the working directory and opens a JDBC connection, storing it in the static field PurchasesPanel.conn.
    getConnection() - Static method in class SalesReportPanel
    This function establishes a connection with the database so that a query is possible.
    getConnection() - Static method in class TransactionsPanel
     
    getConnection() - Static method in class XReportPanel
    Establishes a database connection using credentials from a .env file.
    getConnection() - Static method in class ZReportPanel
    Establishes a connection to the database using credentials from a .env file.
    GetConnection() - Static method in class InventoryPanel
    Opens a JDBC connection using credentials read from the .env file in the working directory, storing the result in the static field InventoryPanel.conn.
    GetConnection() - Static method in class TrendsPanel
    This function establishes a connection with the database so that a query is possible.
    getData() - Method in class PanelTemplate
     
    getDrinkBasePrice(String) - Method in class POSPanel
    Retrieves the base price of a drink from the database by its name.
    GetDrinksAndFoodCount(String, String) - Static method in class TrendsPanel
    This function queries the database for the amount of each item sold in a given time frame.
    GetExpenses(String, String) - Static method in class TrendsPanel
    This function queries the database for the amount loss each month in a given time frame.
    getFoodAndDrinkSales(Timestamp, Timestamp) - Method in class SalesReportPanel
    This function makes a query to the database to gain all the data of food and drink purchases for a given time period.
    getHourlySales() - Method in class XReportPanel
    Retrieves hourly sales and transaction data.
    GetIncome(String, String) - Static method in class TrendsPanel
    This function queries the database for the amount income gained each month in a given time frame.
    getPaymentSummaryData() - Method in class XReportPanel
    Retrieves sales summary data grouped by payment method.
    getPaymentSummaryData() - Method in class ZReportPanel
    Retrieves sales summary data grouped by payment method.
    getPaymentSummaryData(Timestamp, Timestamp) - Method in class SalesReportPanel
    This function makes a query to the database for the payment data of the from the recietps during a given time period.
    getPurchases() - Static method in class PurchasesPanel
    Opens a database connection via PurchasesPanel.getConnection(), executes a SELECT joining the purchase and inventory tables, and returns the resulting ResultSet.
    GetReceipts(String, String) - Static method in class TrendsPanel
    This function queries the database for the amount of receipts each month in a given time frame.
    getSalesData() - Method in class XReportPanel
    Retrieves aggregated sales data for the current day.
    getSalesData() - Method in class ZReportPanel
    Retrieves aggregated sales data for open receipts.
    getSalesData(Timestamp, Timestamp) - Method in class SalesReportPanel
    This function makes a query to the database for the sales data of the food and drinks during a given time period.
    getTableCellEditorComponent(JTable, Object, boolean, int, int) - Method in class POSPanel.ButtonEditor
    Returns the component used for editing a table cell as a button.
    getTableCellRendererComponent(JTable, Object, boolean, boolean, int, int) - Method in class POSPanel.ButtonRenderer
    Returns the component used to render a table cell as a button.
    GetTimes(String, String) - Static method in class TrendsPanel
    This function queries the database for the average number of receipts sold each hour in a given time frame.

    insertCartItems(int) - Method in class POSPanel
    Inserts all items from the cart into the database for a given receipt.

    Deprecated.
    this logic is now handled directly inside MenuPanel.openDrinkDialog(Integer)
    insertFood(String, double) - Method in class MenuPanel
    Deprecated.
    this logic is now handled directly inside MenuPanel.openFoodDialog(Integer)
    insertPurchase(int, int, double, String, String, String) - Method in class PurchasesPanel
    Inserts a new purchase record into the purchase table and increments the corresponding inventory row's amount, both within a single database transaction.
    insertReceiptRow() - Method in class POSPanel
    Inserts a new receipt record into the database and returns its ID.

    Invoked when text is inserted into the document.

    InventoryPanel - Class in Unnamed Package
    A panel that displays the current inventory in a sortable, searchable JTable.
    InventoryPanel(GUI) - Constructor for class InventoryPanel
    Constructs the InventoryPanel, opening a database connection and building the full UI: a top bar with a back button, search field, and action buttons; a split pane containing the inventory table and an item detail panel; and a bottom bar with aggregate stats and a confirm-changes button.
    inventoryTable - Static variable in class InventoryPanel
     
    isEditing - Variable in class InventoryPanel
     

    L

    lastReceipt - Variable in class SalesReportPanel.SalesData
     
    lastReceipt - Variable in class ZReportPanel.SalesData
     
    LoadAllTime(JPanel, JPanel) - Static method in class TrendsPanel
    This function resets the graphs to display the data for all purchase history.
    LoadBarData(ResultSet, String) - Static method in class TrendsPanel
    This function converts the result from a database query and turns it into data ready to be used in creating the bar chart for income and loss each month in a time period.
    loadDrinks() - Method in class MenuPanel
    Queries the drink table and repopulates MenuPanel.drinkModel with the current set of drinks ordered by ID.
    loadFoods() - Method in class MenuPanel
    Queries the food table and repopulates MenuPanel.foodModel with the current set of food items ordered by ID.
    LoadOrderData(ResultSet) - Static method in class TrendsPanel
    This function converts the result from a database query and turns it into data ready to be used in creating the pi chart for number of items sold in a time period.
    LoadReceiptData(ResultSet) - Static method in class TrendsPanel
    This function converts the result from a database query and turns it into data ready to be used in creating the line chart for number of receipts per month in a time period.
    loadTableData() - Method in class PanelTemplate
     
    loadTableData() - Method in class PurchasesPanel
    Clears the table model and reloads all purchase rows from the database via PurchasesPanel.getPurchases().
    loadTableData() - Method in class TransactionsPanel
     
    LoadTimeData(ResultSet) - Static method in class TrendsPanel
    This function converts the result from a database query and turns it into data ready to be used in creating the line chart for average receipts per hour sampled across a time period.
    loadTransactionDetails(Object) - Method in class TransactionsPanel

    lookupCustomer() - Method in class POSPanel
    Searches for a customer in the database using the input from the search field.

    POSPanel - Class in Unnamed Package
    Creates the POS panel they system to place orders
    POSPanel(GUI) - Constructor for class POSPanel
    Populates all the object ont the point of sale page and creates the page layout
    POSPanel.ButtonEditor - Class in Unnamed Package
    Custom table cell editor that allows button interaction within a JTable cell.
    POSPanel.ButtonRenderer - Class in Unnamed Package
    Custom table cell renderer that displays a button in a JTable cell.
    promptForPaymentMethod() - Method in class POSPanel
    Prompts the user to select or enter a payment method
    PurchasesPanel - Class in Unnamed Package
    A panel that displays purchase history loaded from the database, with support for live search filtering, date-range filtering, and adding new purchase records.
    PurchasesPanel(GUI) - Constructor for class PurchasesPanel
    Constructs the PurchasesPanel, building the full UI: a top bar with navigation, search, and date-range fields; a split pane containing the purchases table and a selected-item detail panel; and a bottom summary bar.
    PurchasesPanel.SimpleDocumentListener - Class in Unnamed Package
    A minimal DocumentListener implementation that delegates all three document change events (insert, remove, changed) to a single Runnable, simplifying live-filter wiring on text fields.

    R

    recalcAndUpdateTotalLabel() - Method in class POSPanel
    Recalculates the total cost of the current order and updates the total label.
    RECEIPT_DETAIL_QUERY - Static variable in class TransactionsPanel
     
    receiptArea - Variable in class TransactionsPanel
     
    RedrawGraphs(JPanel, String, String) - Static method in class TrendsPanel
    This function handels calling all of the functions to redo the graphs for an updated giventime period
    RedrawTimeFrame(JPanel, String, String, Boolean) - Static method in class TrendsPanel
    This function handels refreshing the time frame displayed on the bottom on the "Trends" page with a given updated time frame.
    refreshData(String) - Method in class InventoryPanel
    Clears the table model and reloads inventory rows from the database, filtering by name using a case-insensitive ILIKE match on the supplied filter string.
    RefreshGraphs(JPanel, JPanel, JPanel) - Static method in class TrendsPanel
    This function is the higher level function that receives the desired time frame from the user and calls the respective functions to update the "Trends" page accordingly.
    refreshTable() - Method in class TransactionsPanel

    This is the class to hold much of the sales data for a given day.
    saveTableChanges() - Method in class InventoryPanel
    Iterates over every row in InventoryPanel.tableModel and issues a batched UPDATE inventory statement to persist any in-place edits made while the table was in edit mode.

    This function is handels the creation of the second graph which is a bar chart.
    SetUpLineChart(String, String) - Static method in class TrendsPanel
    This function is handels the creation of the third graph which is a pi chart.
    SetUpPiChart(String, String) - Static method in class TrendsPanel
    This function is handels the creation of the first graph which is a pi chart.
    SetUpTimeChart(String, String) - Static method in class TrendsPanel
    This function is handels the creation of the fourth graph which is a pi chart.

    Shows a modal dialog pre-populated with the supplied values, allowing the user to add a new inventory item or duplicate an existing one.

    Displays a modal dialog prompting the user to enter the details of a new purchase (item ID, amount, price, buy date, supplier name, and supplier contact).

    updateOverallSummary() - Method in class PurchasesPanel
    Iterates over all currently visible rows in the table (respecting any active sort/filter) and updates PurchasesPanel.overallSummaryLabel with the aggregate total item count and total amount spent (amount × supplier price).

    Updates the total label to display the current subtotal with standard dollar/cent format>
